_note: All 12 images are aggregate-statistics ('COMPACT DATA 2026-27') ranking tables, not individual sire profile pages, TOC, or feature articles. Each image is a full two-page magazine spread containing dense ranking tables. Section titles and column structure are legible; individual numeric cell values are NOT reliably resolvable at this image resolution, so per-row stat fields are recorded as null per the no-fabrication rule.
